assets.description: Average monthly change in prices of copper, nickel and zinc (2014). Y-axis: % change compared with previous month (-4 to 7). X-axis: Months (J-D). Three metals tracked with different line styles.

data_summary.title: Average monthly change in prices of copper, nickel and zinc (2014)
data_summary.y_axis: % change in price compared with previous month
data_summary.key_trends: All three metals drop sharply in June. Nickel starts highest (6%) in Jan, drops to -3% in June. Zinc most stable overall.

assets.description: Percentage of the population living in cities for 4 Southeast Asian countries (1970-2040). Includes historical data and projections.

data_summary.title: Percentage of the population living in cities
data_summary.key_trends: Malaysia consistently highest (~30% to ~83%). Indonesia rapid growth post-2000. Thailand slowest growth. Philippines moderate growth with some stagnation.

assets.description: Map of a residential housing estate with labeled areas A-I. Features: Lake, Apartment blocks, Housing for the elderly, West Entrance, South Entrance, London Road, Main Road, direction to Nunston. Compass rose (N/S/E/W). Key: Housing pattern.

data_summary.title: Residential Housing Estate Map
data_summary.key_trends: Could be used as map description or paired with 'after' version for comparison

assets.description: Clustered bar chart showing Number of US households (in millions) by annual income for years 2007, 2011, 2015. Five income brackets.

data_summary.title: Number of US households (in millions), by annual income
data_summary.key_trends: Highest income bracket ($100k+) grew significantly from ~16M to ~33M. Lower brackets relatively stable or declining.

assets.description: Floor plan of Central Library 20 years ago. Shows: Entrance (bottom), Enquiry desk, Reading room (newspapers & magazines), Adult fiction books, Adult non-fiction books, Children's books, CDs/videos/computer games, Tables & chairs (center).

data_summary.title: Central Library 20 years ago
rooms: Enquiry desk - tickets, book returns etc. (bottom-right)
data_summary.key_trends: This is labeled '20 years ago' and 'a' in filename - implies a 'b' (current version) will follow for before/after comparison
